items.standfirst: Large-scale evacuation under way in Top End, while most of Queensland remains on flood watch Get our breaking news email, free app or daily news podcastA large-scale evacuation of hundreds of flood-affected Northern Territory residents is under way, as tropical lows bring heavy rain to large parts of the Top End and northern Queensland.Several flood warnings were in place for the NT on Saturday, including for the Katherine and Daly rivers, while most of Queensland remained on flood watch. items.title: The 20-year search for the Nannup Four
items.standfirst: In July 2007, Simon Kadwill, Tony Popic, Chantelle McDougall and her five-year-old daughter Leela vanished from an isolated WA town. Chantelle's parents have spent the better part of 20 years trying to work out how to live with what's happened, as a complex picture of deceit, coercive control and cult-like beliefs has come to light.
